name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-47
title: Step 8 TEST-GREEN report schema embedded as literal text — not executable JSON
description: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py Step 8 (lines 419-435) writes the tdd-report schema inline as a templated literal that the subagent must transcribe (escaped braces, manual quotes). This is fragile — the subagent might mis-quote literal nulls or angle-bracket placeholders, producing invalid JSON. Better: bundle a python -c command or short generator script that emits valid JSON from inputs. Or write a small wrapper script (.claude/features/tdd-subagent/scripts/emit-tdd-report.py) the subagent invokes with --feature/--impl-commit/etc. Currently the subagent is asked to manually author JSON that the dispatcher will later parse.
